stub: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
constituency: He is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: He frequently speaks out and votes against his party leadership.
substantive: He opposes increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, he regularly explains how his decisions help to promote the national interest.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
text: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. He is from a constituency that is not your constituency. He frequently speaks out and votes against his party leadership. He opposes increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, he regularly explains how his decisions help to promote the national interest. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
